title: Buy WBTC - Open App
meta_description: buy wbtc via the official WBTC destination: verify the contract, review supported routes, and open the app before swapping or wrapping.
hero_h2: Get wrapped Bitcoin ready for Ethereum DeFi
hero_lead: buy wbtc through the official WBTC destination to verify the Ethereum contract, review supported routes for wrapping Bitcoin, and move into DeFi with fewer wrong-token risks.
what_is: WBTC is Wrapped Bitcoin, an ERC-20 token designed to represent Bitcoin in Ethereum wallets and DeFi apps; verify the canonical contract on Etherscan.

how.d: Start from wbtc.network and confirm the domain before connecting a wallet or following any route.
Check the WBTC symbol, network, and Ethereum contract address before swapping, wrapping, or accepting a quote.
Use a listed merchant, exchange, wallet, or DEX path that fits your jurisdiction, custody preference, and network choice.
After settlement, review the transaction on an explorer and make sure WBTC appears on the same network you used.

points.p: WBTC brings Bitcoin exposure into ERC-20-compatible wallets, DEXs, lending markets, and smart contract apps.
Use the WBTC token contract to avoid wrong-token copies before you trade or receive funds.
The WBTC framework uses merchant and custodian roles for minting and burning, so distinguish a market swap from a redemption route.

faq.a: Start from the official WBTC domain to verify resources, then use a supported merchant, exchange, wallet, or DEX route appropriate for your jurisdiction and custody preferences.

faq.q: Is WBTC the same as BTC?
faq.a: No. WBTC is a wrapped token that represents Bitcoin in Ethereum-compatible apps, while BTC remains the native Bitcoin asset.

faq.q: Which WBTC contract should I check?
faq.a: On Ethereum, check 0x2260fac5e5542a773aa44fbcfedf7c193bc2c599 before accepting quotes or deposits.

faq.q: Do I need ETH to move WBTC?
faq.a: On Ethereum mainnet, WBTC transfers and swaps require ETH for gas; on other supported networks, use that network's native gas token.

faq.q: Can WBTC be redeemed for Bitcoin?
faq.a: Redemption depends on the merchant, exchange, or custodian route you use, so review KYC requirements, fees, timing, and network support first.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify the domain before connecting, and treat this as educational information, not financial advice.
